Stranger Things Edition

culinema Eleven's iconic Triple Decker Waffle Tower from Stranger Things — and yes, it's just as chaotic and delicious as it looks. 🌀✨

Three layers of golden, crispy waffles stacked sky-high with clouds of whipped cream, colorful candies, chocolate chunks, and Reese's Pieces. No syrup. No rules. Pure Hawkins energy. 🔴

Tag someone you'd share this with — and remember: friends don't lie, but this waffle tower will make you forget every diet you've ever started. 😅
#StrangerThingsFood #WaffleTower #FandomFood #PopCultureEats #ElevenWaffles

✦ The Recipe

Triple Decker
Waffle Tower

Inspired by Eleven's legendary Eggo obsession in Stranger Things — three layers of golden waffles, each crowned with spray whipped cream, colorful candies, and a mountain of chaos on top.

This is not a breakfast. This is a statement.

01
Toast The Waffles

3 frozen waffles, toasted until golden and crispy. Homemade works too — flour, milk, egg, baking powder, vanilla.

02
Layer One

First waffle on plate. Generous spray whipped cream. M&M's + chocolate chips scattered on top.

03
Layer Two

Second waffle. Same treatment. Don't be shy with the whipped cream — Eleven wasn't.

04
The Crown

Final waffle + a mountain of whipped cream. Top with Reese's Pieces, jelly beans, caramel drizzle. Add a cherry if you're feeling dramatic.

⚡
Upside Down Twist

Swap caramel for dark blackberry sauce to achieve the eerie Upside Down aesthetic. Pure chaos. Pure cinema.

#StrangerThingsFood #WaffleTower #FandomFood #PopCultureEats #ElevenWaffles

✦ Post Strategy

Promo Blueprint

📍
Target Markets
Eastern Europe First
Poland, Romania, Hungary, Portugal — low CPM, high fandom culture, Netflix-heavy audiences. Skip UK/Germany for now; too expensive for this budget.
👥
Audience
18–34, Fandom + Food
Interests: Stranger Things, Netflix, Recipe videos, Desserts. Use OR targeting to maximize reach. 5–6€ demands width, not precision.
⏰
Best Timing (TR Time)
Tue/Wed 21:00 TR
That's 19:00–20:00 Central Europe — post-dinner scroll peak. Run the ad across 3–4 days, Reels format. Expect 2,000–4,500 impressions.

friends don't lie — and neither does good food 🧇
